'''Kadlah Cha''' was member of the [[Warrior caste]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. She served as a [[Battle Tactician|battle tactician]] to [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Wyrpuuk Cha]], a member of [[Domain Cha|her]] [[Domain]]. Her facial markings were similar to Wyrpuuk's, and served to enlarge her features.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream]]'' {{1st}}
